items.title: Market maker GSR launches first ETF tracking Bitcoin, Ether and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of an ETF tracking Bitcoin, Ether, and Solana could enhance institutional interest and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: GSR enters crypto ETF field with actively managed multi-asset fund tracking Bitcoin, Ethereum and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: GSR's entry into the crypto ETF market with a multi-asset fund may increase exposure and usage of Solana alongside Bitcoin and Ethereum.

items.title: Meteora [MET] jumps 30% with 3000% volume spike – Can it hold?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant volume spike in Meteora indicates heightened trading activity, which could influence overall market sentiment and liquidity for related assets.
